4 Most effective skincare combinations Zero brand deals. Zero bias. 💊  For home care only. Rx and in-office treatments are stronger — see a dermatologist for severe cases.  ⚫ Pores — COSRX BHA Blackhead Power Liquid + Purito Galacto Niacin 97  BHA dissolves inside pores. Niacinamide tightens them.  Apply BHA first. Wait 10 min, then layer niacinamide.  🔴 Acne — COSRX BHA Blackhead Power Liquid + Anua Azelaic Acid 10%  BHA clears the clog. Azelaic acid kills bacteria + calms redness.  Alternate nights if skin is sensitive.  🌿 Rosacea — Anua Azelaic Acid 10% + Purito Galacto Niacin 97  Azelaic acid reduces flushing. Niacinamide strengthens the barrier.  Both fragrance-free. Safe for reactive skin.  🟡 Wrinkles — Celimax Retinal Shot + The Ordinary Ascorbyl Glucoside 12%  Retinal rebuilds overnight. Vitamin C brightens in the morning.  Don't layer — retinal PM, vitamin C AM.  *Products are ones I regularly recommend. Better options exist — use what fits your skin.  Drop your skin concern in the comments 👇  #kbeauty #koreanskincare #acne #pores #azelaicacid

Niacinamide is a great ingredient, but it doesn’t actually shrink pores. Pore size is mostly genetic. It can help regulate oil which may make pores look a little smaller — but it’s not the miracle pore-shrinker people think it is. 9 Must-know facts about Niacinamide skincare by Korean pharmacist. 🟢 Acne — YES (oil control + anti-inflammatory, calms breakouts) 🔴 Acne scars — NO (could fades PIH/redness, but won't erase true scars) 🟢 Pores — YES (regulates sebum, smooths pore look over time) 🟢 Redness — YES (one of the best calmers, even for rosacea-prone) 🔴 Higher % = better — NO (2–5% sweet spot. 10%+ often irritates) 🟢 Pair with BHA or azelaic acid — YES, nice combo With BHA: unclogs pores. With Azelaic acid: stronger PIH fade. Start slow if you have sensitive skin. 🟢 Pregnancy & teens — YES (one of the safest actives out there) ✅ Would I recommend it to followers? Sure. Which one surprised you? 👇 #kbeauty #pharmacytiktok #acne #pores #niacinamide

햄스터 키우면서 영어 공부하는 법 🐹📖 게임 앱 같은데 영어 단어 학습 앱인  Hamchee 를 소개할게요!  책으로 영어 단어 외우려면 잘 안 외워지고 솔직히 시작하기도 싫잖아요. 근데 Hamchee 앱은 영어 단어를 외우면 보상이 쌓이고, 그걸로 햄스터 먹이도 주고 집도 꾸미고 가구도 살 수 있어서 게임하듯이 하게 돼서 부담이 덜하고, 집 꾸미고 싶어서 괜히 단어 하나 더 외우게 되더라구요…🥹 카드 넘기듯이 단어 외우고 맞추고, 다시 확인하고, 스펠링 체크랑 받아쓰기까지 바로 이어지니까 자연스럽게 반복되면서 기억에 남아요. 틀린 단어는 자동으로 다시 모아줘서 오답노트처럼 복습하기도 좋고요 📚 아이패드나 핸드폰으로 어디서든 짧게 하기 좋고, 최근엔 CAST 단어팩도 추가돼서 표현 연습까지 같이 하기 좋아졌어요!  영어 단어가 지루했던 분들, Hamchee를 한 번 써보세요 🐹💛 #hamchee #햄치 #영어공부 #단어암기
